---
title: "G.O.A.T?"
author: "Håvard Strand"
description: ""
date: "2026-06-22 23:36:00"
categories: [Update]
---

# Messi beats Austria

As a kid I watched Maradonna dismatle Belgium in Mexico '86. I assume today's 10-year olds will think of Messi in the same way. 

The outcome was expected and the score was too. 4 of us had a draw -- among them Christian, who's lead is down to 44 points. 

```{r standings, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source(here::here("R", "plot_standings.R"))
this_match <- 43
lag        <- 1
plot_standings(this_match, lag)
```

```{r show, echo=FALSE}
knitr::include_graphics("standings.png")
```
